title: FlashFilter - Flash Filter for Photosensitive Epilepsy
excerpt: FlashFilter is a GPU accelerated screen filter for photosensitive epilepsy which can soften or remove flashing and strobing content before it reaches your eyes.
content_html:
For photosensitive safety

Stop flashing content
before it reaches your eyes.

FlashFilter is a flash filter for photosensitive epilepsy. It lowers the risk of seizures and migraines set off by flashing on-screen content, in games, video, and across the web. Built for people with photosensitive epilepsy or sensitivity to strobing light, it runs quietly in the background and softens dangerous flashes before they reach you.

Free public beta. Opens June 30, free through August 25. No card required.

Protection

The only thing that changes is the danger

FlashFilter watches everything on your screen and softens harsh flashes and sudden brightness spikes in place. There is no dark overlay and no colour tint over your whole display. The flash is what gets smoothed away, so the rest of the picture looks just as it should.

Performance

Light on your system

FlashFilter runs on your GPU and does its work in a fraction of a frame. It will not slow your computer down, lag your games, or drain your battery, even on the fastest and smoothest screens. It stays out of your way.

Compatibility

Every desktop

Works on Windows, Mac, and Linux. It uses each system's native graphics stack and runs smoothly on all three. Install it on every device you use.

Privacy

Your frames, your business

All filtering happens right on your own computer. What is on your screen stays with you and never leaves your machine. We do not track how you use FlashFilter. The only account detail we need is the sign-in that carries your licence.

Questions

Flash filtering for photosensitive epilepsy, explained

What FlashFilter does, who it is for, and how the screen filter protects against flashing and strobing content.

What is FlashFilter?

FlashFilter is a screen filter that primarily aims to remove flashing from a real time video stream. It works across games, video, and the whole web, without a dark overlay or a colour tint over your display.

Who is FlashFilter for?

It is built for people with photosensitive epilepsy or a sensitivity to strobing and flashing light, and for anyone who gets migraines or discomfort from harsh on-screen flashes. If flashing content on a screen is a problem for you, FlashFilter is meant to help.

How does the epilepsy screen filter work?

FlashFilter runs as a GPU compositing layer between your desktop and your display. It analyses every frame for flashing and depending on your preferences will dampen or remove it real time.

Does the photosensitive flash filter work in games and video?

Yes. FlashFilter filters everything on your screen - games, streaming and local video, browsers, and any other application - because it works on the final composited image rather than hooking into individual apps.

Which operating systems does FlashFilter support?

FlashFilter runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux, using each system's native GPU graphics stack (DirectX 12, Metal, and Vulkan respectively). Linux support is Wayland only and varies depending on the compositor, the constraint on the compositor is that it must be able to run nested (have a Wayland backend for output which uses zwp_linux_dmabuf_v1).

Will it slow down my computer?

Practically no. Filtering runs on your GPU and completes in a fraction of a frame, so it will not lag games or significantly drain battery anymore than any other background process. That being said, we provide a few different algorithms configuration options which generally trade off performance and filtering quality (level of artifacting and resolution).

Is my screen data private?

Yes. All filtering happens locally on your own computer. What is on your screen never leaves your machine, and FlashFilter does not track how you use it.

Is FlashFilter a medical device?

No. FlashFilter is not a medical device and is not a substitute for medical advice. It reduces flashing that may trigger symptoms but cannot guarantee that all of it is removed.

Public beta

Try it free from June 30

The first public beta opens on June 30 and is free to use through August 25. No card is required. After the beta, FlashFilter continues as a subscription. Read the latest update for the full details.

Get the beta free

[email protected]

FlashFilter is not a medical device and is not a substitute for medical advice. It reduces flashing that may trigger symptoms but cannot guarantee that all of it is removed. Learn more about photosensitive epilepsy and the WCAG flash thresholds that inform how flashing content is measured.

content_html_zh:
为了感光安全

在内容到达您的眼睛之前停止闪烁。

FlashFilter是一款针对光敏性癫痫的闪光滤镜。 它可以降低因游戏、视频和网络上闪烁的屏幕内容引发癫痫和偏头痛的风险。 它专为患有光敏性癫痫或对频闪灯敏感的人而设计，它在背景中安静地运行，并在危险的闪光到达您之前将其软化。

免费公开测试版。 6 月 30 日开放，8 月 25 日之前免费。 无需卡。

保护

唯一改变的是危险

FlashFilter 会监视屏幕上的所有内容，并适当柔化刺眼的闪光和突然的亮度峰值。 整个显示屏上没有深色覆盖层，也没有色调。 闪光被平滑掉了，所以图片的其余部分看起来就像它应该的那样。

表现

点亮您的系统

FlashFilter 在 GPU 上运行，并在一小部分帧内完成工作。 即使在最快、最流畅的屏幕上，它也不会减慢您的计算机速度、延迟您的游戏或耗尽您的电池。 它不会妨碍您。

兼容性

每个桌面

适用于 Windows、Mac 和 Linux。 它使用每个系统的本机图形堆栈，并在所有三个系统上流畅运行。 将其安装在您使用的每台设备上。

隐私

您的框架，您的事业

所有过滤都发生在您自己的计算机上。 屏幕上的内容会一直伴随着您，永远不会离开您的机器。 我们不会跟踪您如何使用 FlashFilter。 我们唯一需要的帐户详细信息是带有您的许可证的登录信息。

问题

解释光敏性癫痫的闪光过滤

FlashFilter 的作用、用途以及屏幕过滤器如何防止闪烁和频闪内容。

What is FlashFilter?

FlashFilter 是一种屏幕过滤器，主要目的是消除实时视频流中的闪烁。 它适用于游戏、视频和整个网络，显示屏上不会出现深色覆盖层或色调。

Who is FlashFilter for?

它专为患有光敏性癫痫症或对频闪和闪烁光敏感的人以及因屏幕上的强烈闪光而出现偏头痛或不适的人而设计。 如果屏幕上的闪烁内容对您来说是个问题，FlashFilter 可以为您提供帮助。

How does the epilepsy screen filter work?

FlashFilter 作为桌面和显示器之间的 GPU 合成层运行。 它会分析每一帧的闪烁情况，并根据您的喜好实时抑制或删除它。

Does the photosensitive flash filter work in games and video?

是的。 FlashFilter 可以过滤屏幕上的所有内容 - 游戏、流媒体和本地视频、浏览器以及任何其他应用程序 - 因为它适用于最终的合成图像，而不是挂钩到各个应用程序。

Which operating systems does FlashFilter support?

FlashFilter 在 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 上运行，使用每个系统的本机 GPU 图形堆栈（分别为 DirectX 12、Metal 和 Vulkan）。 Linux 仅支持 Wayland，并且根据合成器的不同而有所不同，对合成器的限制是它必须能够嵌套运行（有一个使用 zwp_linux_dmabuf_v1 进行输出的 Wayland 后端）。

Will it slow down my computer?

实际上没有。 过滤在您的 GPU 上运行并在一小部分帧内完成，因此它不会比任何其他后台进程延迟游戏或显着消耗电池。 话虽这么说，我们提供了一些不同的算法配置选项，这些选项通常会权衡性能和过滤质量（伪像和分辨率水平）。

Is my screen data private?

是的。 所有过滤都在您自己的计算机上本地进行。 屏幕上的内容永远不会离开您的计算机，FlashFilter 不会跟踪您如何使用它。

Is FlashFilter a medical device?

不。FlashFilter 不是医疗设备，也不能替代医疗建议。 它可以减少可能引发症状的闪光，但不能保证所有症状都被消除。

公开测试版

6 月 30 日起免费试用

第一个公开测试版于 6 月 30 日开放，免费使用至 8 月 25 日。 不需要卡。 测试版结束后，FlashFilter 将继续作为订阅。 请阅读最新更新以获取完整详细信息。
